title: Digital Realty Trust: Stable Return In An Explosive Industry
text: Digital Realty Trust is a data center REIT with global operations. The industry is very likely to benefit from the AI-craze and provide stable returns to investors via a 5% dividend. I issue a buy rating for DLR based on undervaluation.

title: Digital Realty: You Can Get Paid To Ride The AI Wave
text: Digital Realty (DLR) is a leading data center REIT with a global presence, providing colocation and interconnection solutions to customers such as Microsoft and Meta Platforms. DLR is well-positioned to benefit from the growing AI trend, with strong demand and increasing rents contributing to healthy same-store cash NOI growth. DLR stock offers an attractive 4.9% dividend yield and potential for capital appreciation, making it a solid income-oriented play for investors seeking exposure to data centers and AI.

title: Billionaire Investor Says 'Sell Real Estate'
text: Billionaire Charlie Munger recently warned investors. He said that commercial real estate is facing severe challenges.

title: 5 'Strong Buy' REITs With A Wide Margin Of Safety
text: It took some very tough lessons in life before I emerged with a mindset and determination to seek value without taking on excessive risks. While these hardships remain a distant memory, they're constant reminders that define the traits of my investment strategy today.

title: If I Were Starting Over In My 20s, I Would Buy These REITs
text: I teach frequently at many colleges and universities, lecturing on the topic of REITs as I really enjoy teaching students the benefits of owning real estate stocks. So far this year, I've lectured at Penn State, University of North Carolina, NYU, and Clemson University, and I look forward to launching my very own REIT Masterclass this summer.

title: REITs Will Go Bankrupt? Not So Fast
text: REITs are facing an "existential crisis" according to some investors. They claim that REITs will go bankrupt as they fail to refinance their debt.

title: 3 Promising Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist
text: Thinking of stocks to buy hand over fist may seem foolish considering all the debt-ceiling drama or the possibility of the U.S. economy plunging into a recession. After all, willy-nilly investing isn't a smart move no matter what the economic conditions are.

title: Inflation Cools, But Nobody Believes It
text: U.S. equity markets finished lower for a second-straight week as data showing an encouraging cooldown of inflationary pressures was offset by ongoing regional bank instability and an unresolved debt ceiling standoff. Declining for a second week after ending April at its highest levels of the year, the S&P 500 slipped 0.3% on the week, but the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 gained nearly 1%.

title: The Ultimate Kryptonite For REIT Shorts
text: Over the last few months, we've seen a growing number of short sellers enter REIT-dom as it's somewhat of a perfect storm. Inflation, rising rates, a banking crisis, and a CRE (commercial real estate) meltdown (as the media describes) have given short sellers a perfect canvas for painting their fear-based short pitch.

title: Winners Of REIT Earnings Season
text: You wouldn't know it by reading the mainstream financial press, but there's more to commercial real estate than office buildings. Obscured by office pain, REITs delivered surprisingly strong first quarter results. Of the 83 equity REITs that provide full-year Funds from Operations ("FFO") guidance, 37 (44%) raised their full-year earnings outlook, while 5 (6%) lowered guidance.

title: Artificial Intelligence Could Launch a New Growth Wave for This High-Yield Dividend Stock
text: Digital Realty believes AI could drive a new growth wave for data center demand. The company is already starting to see some AI-related demand materialize.

title: 3 Top Monthly Dividend Stocks for Income Investors
text: With most companies distributing dividends quarterly, investors needing predictable monthly cash flow could desire more frequent payouts. The good news is that there are a number of securities that pay dividends on a monthly basis, helping to deliver a steady stream of income.

title: The Fate of This 4.9%-Yielding Dividend Hangs on Executing a $2 Billion Strategy
text: Digital Realty's earnings remain under pressure. The real estate investment trust's balance sheet is also ballooning.
